data.context_layout: context/<Persona>/{prompt.txt,fastmemory.json,state.json}; state.json contains context/focus/meta/toolbox runtime state; context/Matrix/schema/codex_tools.rsinc
data.dynamic_role_protocol: DynamicRoleContract v1; Matrix-created roles expose identity/storage/capability/context_governance, standard context+memory layout, required persona_manage tooling, independent chat session, UI tab contract, and governance catalog summary
data.memory_layout: memory/<Persona>/{datememorycontext.json buffer, datememory.db SQL diary, metamemory.db, toolmemory.db}; memory/output/{terminal,multiagent,message}; datememorycontext is a transient writeback buffer and must be persisted via memory_add target=datememory clear_context=true
data.scheduler_protocol: scheduler.task.started/progress/done/timeout/cancelled/skipped; dedupe_key + deadline + cancel scope; payload_policy=replace_not_stack; retries must not append prior failed payloads
data.tool_output_protocol: ToolOutputEnvelope v1; large outputs externalize to memory/output and emit tool.output.externalized; memory_read target=output is the only model-facing live-output reader and supports latest/tail/range/since_cursor/summary/full with 32KiB default and 128KiB hard cap
data.tool_projection_protocol: ToolProjectionSnapshot v1; read-only reconciliation of builtin personas and dynamic roles covering default_tools, governance auto tools, observe/toolbox state, provider exposure, callable sets, and per-tool reasons

本轮无新图片路径。

data.config_governance_protocol: tool_manage.settings governance v1; Matrix-only unified settings route manages KB tool-output budgets, Matrix system experience parameters, theme, and static persona provider/model routing; dynamic roles stay under role/context_governance routing; context_governance_set remains separate for advisor_managed/self_compact thresholds
data.context_layout: context/<Persona>/{prompt.txt,fastmemory.json,state.json}; state.json contains context/focus/meta/toolbox runtime state; context/Matrix/schema/codex_tools.rsinc
data.dynamic_role_protocol: DynamicRoleContract v1; Matrix-created roles expose identity/storage/capability/context_governance, standard context+memory layout, required persona_manage tooling, independent chat session, UI tab contract, and governance catalog summary
data.memory_layout: memory/<Persona>/{datememorycontext.json buffer, datememory.db SQL diary, metamemory.db, toolmemory.db}; memory/output/{terminal,multiagent,message}; datememorycontext is a transient writeback buffer and must be persisted via memory_add target=datememory clear_context=true
data.scheduler_protocol: scheduler.task.started/progress/done/timeout/cancelled/skipped; dedupe_key + deadline + cancel scope; payload_policy=replace_not_stack; retries must not append prior failed payloads
data.tool_output_protocol: ToolOutputEnvelope v1; large outputs externalize to memory/output and emit tool.output.externalized; memory_read target=output is the only model-facing live-output reader and supports latest/tail/range/since_cursor/summary/full with 32KiB default and 128KiB hard cap
data.tool_projection_protocol: ToolProjectionSnapshot v1; read-only reconciliation of builtin personas and dynamic roles covering default_tools, governance auto tools, observe/toolbox state, provider exposure, callable sets, and per-tool reasons

## 一句话结论

**目前没有明显“服务器被打穿”的证据。**  
有的是：

- SSH 常规扫描
- NewAPI 自动化注册试探
- 业务长请求超时

`auto_wedx7etg` 可疑，但**暂时不算危险破坏者**。

data.text_preview:
我看了，**目前没有看到“已被打穿/正在被持续入侵”的明确证据**。  
但有一些**常见的外部探测和自动化访问痕迹**，需要区分开。

## 现在的判断

### 1) SSH 侧
- 有**少量失败登录**，来源都是常见扫描 IP。
- `fail2ban` 是**激活**的，`sshd` 也在受保护。
- 没看到…

你现在直连链路没有明显丢包，但平均 `170ms+`，且生图长请求对抖动敏感。  
所以从体验和稳定性上，我更建议你上一个**香港三网优化中转节点**，而不是把全部 API 丢给普通 CDN。

data.config_governance_protocol: tool_manage.settings governance v1; Matrix-only unified settings route manages KB tool-output budgets, Matrix system experience parameters, theme, and static persona provider/model routing; dynamic roles stay under role/context_governance routing; context_governance_set remains separate for advisor_managed/self_compact thresholds
data.context_layout: context/<Persona>/{prompt.txt,fastmemory.json,state.json}; state.json contains context/focus/meta/toolbox runtime state; context/Matrix/schema/codex_tools.rsinc
data.dynamic_role_protocol: DynamicRoleContract v1; Matrix-created roles expose identity/storage/capability/context_governance, standard context+memory layout, required persona_manage tooling, independent chat session, UI tab contract, and governance catalog summary
data.memory_layout: memory/<Persona>/{datememorycontext.json buffer, datememory.db SQL diary, metamemory.db, toolmemory.db}; memory/output/{terminal,multiagent,message}; datememorycontext is a transient writeback buffer and must be persisted via memory_add target=datememory clear_context=true
data.scheduler_protocol: scheduler.task.started/progress/done/timeout/cancelled/skipped; dedupe_key + deadline + cancel scope; payload_policy=replace_not_stack; retries must not append prior failed payloads
data.tool_output_protocol: ToolOutputEnvelope v1; large outputs externalize to memory/output and emit tool.output.externalized; memory_read target=output is the only model-facing live-output reader and supports latest/tail/range/since_cursor/summary/full with 32KiB default and 128KiB hard cap
data.tool_projection_protocol: ToolProjectionSnapshot v1; read-only reconciliation of builtin personas and dynamic roles covering default_tools, governance auto tools, observe/toolbox state, provider exposure, callable sets, and per-tool reasons

data.config_governance_protocol: tool_manage.settings governance v1; Matrix-only unified settings route manages KB tool-output budgets, Matrix system experience parameters, theme, and static persona provider/model routing; dynamic roles stay under role/context_governance routing; context_governance_set remains separate for advisor_managed/self_compact thresholds
data.context_layout: context/<Persona>/{prompt.txt,fastmemory.json,state.json}; state.json contains context/focus/meta/toolbox runtime state; context/Matrix/schema/codex_tools.rsinc
data.dynamic_role_protocol: DynamicRoleContract v1; Matrix-created roles expose identity/storage/capability/context_governance, standard context+memory layout, required persona_manage tooling, independent chat session, UI tab contract, and governance catalog summary
data.memory_layout: memory/<Persona>/{datememorycontext.json buffer, datememory.db SQL diary, metamemory.db, toolmemory.db}; memory/output/{terminal,multiagent,message}; datememorycontext is a transient writeback buffer and must be persisted via memory_add target=datememory clear_context=true
data.scheduler_protocol: scheduler.task.started/progress/done/timeout/cancelled/skipped; dedupe_key + deadline + cancel scope; payload_policy=replace_not_stack; retries must not append prior failed payloads
data.tool_output_protocol: ToolOutputEnvelope v1; large outputs externalize to memory/output and emit tool.output.externalized; memory_read target=output is the only model-facing live-output reader and supports latest/tail/range/since_cursor/summary/full with 32KiB default and 128KiB hard cap
data.tool_projection_protocol: ToolProjectionSnapshot v1; read-only reconciliation of builtin personas and dynamic roles covering default_tools, governance auto tools, observe/toolbox state, provider exposure, callable sets, and per-tool reasons

data.text_preview:
那我们就接着当前状态来。

现在最值得继续的有两条线，你选一个即可：

data.text_preview:
你可能是想问 **“Server 请求失败是什么”**。

简单说：

> **Server 请求失败 = Server 这边发出去的调用，没有拿到正常成功响应。**

常见表现有这些：

- `401 / 403`：鉴权失败
- `429`：限流 / 冷却
- `503`：上游不可用 / 路由不对
- `504`：网…

data.config_governance_protocol: tool_manage.settings governance v1; Matrix-only unified settings route manages KB tool-output budgets, Matrix system experience parameters, theme, and static persona provider/model routing; dynamic roles stay under role/context_governance routing; context_governance_set remains separate for advisor_managed/self_compact thresholds
data.context_layout: context/<Persona>/{prompt.txt,fastmemory.json,state.json}; state.json contains context/focus/meta/toolbox runtime state; context/Matrix/schema/codex_tools.rsinc
data.dynamic_role_protocol: DynamicRoleContract v1; Matrix-created roles expose identity/storage/capability/context_governance, standard context+memory layout, required persona_manage tooling, independent chat session, UI tab contract, and governance catalog summary
data.memory_layout: memory/<Persona>/{datememorycontext.json buffer, datememory.db SQL diary, metamemory.db, toolmemory.db}; memory/output/{terminal,multiagent,message}; datememorycontext is a transient writeback buffer and must be persisted via memory_add target=datememory clear_context=true
data.scheduler_protocol: scheduler.task.started/progress/done/timeout/cancelled/skipped; dedupe_key + deadline + cancel scope; payload_policy=replace_not_stack; retries must not append prior failed payloads
data.tool_output_protocol: ToolOutputEnvelope v1; large outputs externalize to memory/output and emit tool.output.externalized; memory_read target=output is the only model-facing live-output reader and supports latest/tail/range/since_cursor/summary/full with 32KiB default and 128KiB hard cap
data.tool_projection_protocol: ToolProjectionSnapshot v1; read-only reconciliation of builtin personas and dynamic roles covering default_tools, governance auto tools, observe/toolbox state, provider exposure, callable sets, and per-tool reasons
